metadata.title: Stable diffusion dreams of "blueberry spaghetti" for one night
metadata.description:
Prompt: "blueberry spaghetti"
Stable diffusion takes a noise vector as input and samples an image. To create this video I simply smoothly interpolate between randomly chosen noise vectors and render frames along the way.

Links
- Stable diffusion: https://stability.ai/blog
- Code used to make this video: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/00103b0037c5aaea32fe1da1af553355
- My twitter: https://twitter.com/karpathy

title: Stable diffusion dreams of "blueberry spaghetti" for one night
